meta_title: For Founders: Claude Code skills setup to Solve can't finish projects (Advanced Checklist)
meta_description: Learn how to Claude Code skills setup and overcome can't finish projects. A Advanced-level Checklist using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Founders: Claude Code Skills Setup to Finish SaaS Projects
content.seo_description: Stop stalling your SaaS. Use this advanced Claude Code setup guide with Antigravity to ship faster, automate technical debt, and finally launch your MVP.
content.answer_block: You aren't failing because you lack talent; you are failing because your development velocity cannot outpace your feature creep. By integrating Claude Code with Antigravity, you transform your CLI into a high-leverage engineering engine, enabling autonomous refactoring, rapid prototyping, and automated bug squashing that turns stalled projects into shippable revenue-generating assets.
content.intro:
The graveyard of SaaS startups is littered with 'almost-finished' MVPs. You start with a vision, code for three weeks, hit a complex architectural hurdle, and the momentum dies. The technical debt piles up, your motivation wanes, and your product remains a collection of half-baked commits in a private repo.

This isn't a failure of imagination; it's a failure of tooling. To ship, you must move from manual coding to 'AI-orchestrated engineering.' By configuring Claude Code with Antigravity, you stop being a bottleneck and start being a conductor, delegating the grunt work of boilerplate and refactoring to an agent that never sleeps.

steps.title: Environment Contextualization
steps.description: Establish a clear project boundary so the agent understands your stack, revenue model, and constraints.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Analyze the current directory structure and summarize the core business logic. Identify potential bottlenecks in the MVP architecture that could slow down deployment.
steps.claude_code_command: claude init --context 'Founder-led SaaS project, focus on speed-to-market and Stripe integration.'

steps.title: Automated Technical Debt Audit
steps.description: Identify the code blocks preventing completion and prioritize them based on business impact.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Audit the codebase for 'dead-end' functions or overly complex abstractions. Suggest a refactor plan that simplifies the logic for faster iteration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --task 'Audit the codebase for technical debt and prioritize refactoring tasks that block the MVP launch.'

steps.title: Rapid Feature Prototyping
steps.description: Generate high-value features using context-aware code generation to maintain momentum.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate a robust authentication and billing integration module using standard industry best practices for a SaaS boilerplate.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --task 'Implement Stripe Checkout integration and user auth middleware following the existing architecture.'

steps.title: Unit Test Automation
steps.description: Ensure your velocity doesn't break your existing features by automating the test suite.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a suite of integration tests for the primary user flow. Ensure all critical business paths are covered to prevent regressions during rapid iteration.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --task 'Generate and run unit tests for all core business logic files in the /src directory.'

steps.title: Continuous Deployment Readiness
steps.description: Package the project for production and ensure all environment variables and secrets are handled securely.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Review deployment configuration files and ensure compatibility with Vercel/AWS. Suggest final optimizations for production performance.
steps.claude_code_command: claude --task 'Optimize the build pipeline and generate a checklist for production deployment.'

pro_tips: Use custom .claude-ignore files to prevent the agent from reading massive node_modules or build folders, saving context window space.
Always define your 'Definition of Done' in the initial prompt to prevent the agent from entering infinite refinement loops.
Map your database schema in a dedicated docs/schema.md file so Claude has a persistent reference for all API interactions.
Use 'claude --verbose' during complex refactors to catch hallucinations before they are committed to your main branch.
Treat your agent as a junior developer: perform code reviews on every output to maintain architectural integrity.
content.next_steps: Once the MVP is functional, shift your focus to setting up a CI/CD pipeline and implementing user feedback loops to validate your market fit.
content.conversion_block: Stop letting your ideas die in the IDE. Leverage the power of AI-driven engineering to turn your MVP into a revenue-generating reality. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
